subcodes.title: Words spoken at Grand Hotel in Vienna, 1913-04-23
subcodes.first_line: The greatest consolation for the heart is the Love of God. This is the balm for every wound and the remedy for every ailment.
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @consolation and comfort, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @light and darkness
